title: Bright Sunflower
description: A player-friendly infection-themed mod: a mysterious will from the Sunflower Plains will fight with everything it’s got to keep you alive against onslaughts from other infection mods.
body:
In this mod

Players can right-click a sunflower with either Golden Bone Meal or Enchanted Golden Bone Meal to instantly create a Sunflower Plains biome.

在这个模组里，玩家可以使用黄金骨粉或附魔黄金骨粉右键向日葵，直接创造出向日葵平原

![the sunflower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0aab0515521b6681e457df46fc6f9329606a3c75.png)

You’re free to drop this into any modpack—no need to ask or get permission—and recording videos is more than welcome.

可以自由随意的加入到整合包中，无须询问或申请，录制视频也非常的欢迎。

Recommended to install [Youkai's Homecoming](https://modrinth.com/mod/youkaishomecoming) for the full experience.

推荐安装[妖怪们的归家](https://modrinth.com/mod/youkaishomecoming)模组一起游玩

Feature：


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1. Within the Sunflower Plains biome, every vanilla mob except the Warden, Wither and Ender Dragon is pacified: they will not attack one another.

2. If any non-vanilla hostile mob enters the Sunflower Plains, every native mob will immediately turn on it and fight together.

3. Non-vanilla neutral mobs that choose to strike first will be counter-attacked by the biome’s defenders.

4. Creatures from [Youkai's Homecoming](https://modrinth.com/mod/youkaishomecoming) and Fairy Maids from [Touhou Little Maid](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid) are treated as “vanilla-allied” and share the same cease-fire rules.

5. Should blocks from the Sculk or any “infection-type” mod start to spread into the Sunflower Plains, the biome will instantly convert them back to their original vanilla form.

6. When any mob dies inside the Sunflower Plains, a sunflower is planted at its feet.  
   - Flying mobs place the flower on the ground directly below them.  
   - If the target block can’t support a sunflower, it is turned to grass first.

7. If a mob dies within 16 blocks of a sunflower that is NOT already inside a Sunflower Plains biome, there is a chance (random, undocumented—call it a feature) that the surrounding biome will be converted into Sunflower Plains.

8. Whenever a mob dies within 16 blocks of a sunflower, an additional sunflower will also sprout at a valid, plantable spot nearby.

9. While inside Sunflower Plains, every vanilla mob (minus Warden/Wither/Ender Dragon) as well as [Youkai's Homecoming](https://modrinth.com/mod/youkaishomecoming) and Fairy Maids from [Touhou Little Maid](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid) spawn with:  
   - Max HP ×5  
   - +10 Armor  
   - +10 Armor Toughness

10. Killing another mob while inside the biome grants the attacker “Bless of Sunflower”—a powerful regeneration buff that works on any creature type.

11. Taking damage inside the biome instantly gives the victim 10 s of Resistance II and purges all negative effects.

12. Mob-death loot table inside Sunflower Plains

![Mob-death loot table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10d616d195ee71bb6f8e2e60be2acce4f7fcfbd9.png)


</details>

中文详细介绍：


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

1，向日葵平原群系范围内，除监守者、凋灵、末影龙外的所有原版生物不会互相攻击

2，一旦有非原版的敌对生物进入向日葵平原，将会被群起而攻之

3，如果非原版的非敌对生物主动攻击，则会被反击

4，[妖怪们的归家](https://modrinth.com/mod/youkaishomecoming) 模组的生物和 [车万女仆](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid)模组的妖精女仆，与原版生物处在同一阵营

5，如果有幽匿或其他感染模组的方块试图蔓延到向日葵平原群系，向日葵平原群系会直接转化其为原版方块

6，如果有生物在向日葵平原死亡，会在其下方种下一株向日葵。如果是飞行怪，则会在其下方的地面种上向日葵。如果下方方块不能种植向日葵，则会把方块变成草方块，然后再种

7，如果有生物在向日葵附近16格死亡，且向日葵所在的区域不是向日葵平原，那么将会有概率把向日葵附近的群系变为向日葵平原
（概率随机，我也不确定，因为这是个排查不出来的bug，实在修不好，索性就当模组功能吧）

8，如果有生物在向日葵附近16格死亡，则会在向日葵所在位置附近，能够种植向日葵的地方，种下向日葵

9，向日葵平原内，[妖怪们的归家](https://modrinth.com/mod/youkaishomecoming) 模组的生物和 [车万女仆](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid)模组的妖精女仆以及原版除监守者、凋灵、末影龙外的所有原版生物在向日葵平原生成的时候，最大血量x5，护甲+10，护甲韧性+10

10，向日葵平原内，[妖怪们的归家](https://modrinth.com/mod/youkaishomecoming) 模组的生物和 [车万女仆](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid)模组的妖精女仆以及原版除监守者、凋灵、末影龙外的所有原版生物在击杀其它生物的时候，会获得葵之祝福buff
（葵之祝福，强效的生命恢复buff，适用于所有种类的生物）

11，向日葵平原内，[妖怪们的归家](https://modrinth.com/mod/youkaishomecoming) 模组的生物和 [车万女仆](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid)模组的妖精女仆以及原版除监守者、凋灵、末影龙外的所有原版生物，在向日葵平原受到攻击的话，会获得10秒的抗性提升2，清除所有负面效果

12，如果有生物在向日葵平原内死亡

![mod death loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e8f5e7ad8677a44d76b3901e7ffefb0ecc5bc85.png)

</details>
